rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PERCY ORLANDO GREEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petitioner, a professional fiduciary currently serving as special administrator, is a nominee of Lamonte Foggy, one of the children of the decedent's predeceased spouse. Darrell Brown (decedent's brother) or his nominee has higher priority for appointment under Probate Code sections 8461(f) or 8465(b). If Darrell Brown fails to claim priority, Joan Foggy, one of the children of the decedent's predeceased spouse whose competing petition is on file and set for 06/05/2024, has priority over the petitioner under section 8465(c), as Lamonte Foggy who nominated the petitioner is in the same class of Joan Foggy. No objection has been filed to Joan Foggy's competing petition to challenge her fitness to serve as successor administrator, despite her higher statutory priority. 2) Letters of special administration issued to the petitioner will expire on the date of this hearing. If the petition is continued, the Court may be asked to issue an order extending special administration on the same terms and conditions set forth in the Court's 04/15/2024 order, with new letters of special administration expiring on the continued hearing date. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EVELYN JUNG WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/5/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The proof of service filed on 4/11/24 is incomplete at item 4a. (2) One of the beneficiaries of the devisee trust is a minor. A guardian ad litem must be appointed to represent his interest. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 5/22/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Although the petitioner's declaration filed on 4/11/23 does not specifically set forth the amount of bond, given her allegations in paragraph 5 of that declaration a minimum bond of $20,000 will be required. "Remote Contingent Trust Beneficiary" is not a relationship to the decedent; a person is either kin or a stranger. )
